title: Task Manifest
description: Declares the set of tasks for a workflow and their inter-task dependencies. The workflow engine uses this to gate dispatch: a task cannot leave ASSIGN until all its dependsOn tasks have reached DONE. When a dependency escalates and blockOnFailure is true, the dependent task transitions to BLOCKED.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema self-reference for editor validation.

workflowId.description: Workflow ID this manifest applies to. Must match a loaded workflow definition's id field.

wipLimit.description: Maximum number of tasks that may be in non-terminal, non-ASSIGN states simultaneously. Prevents cascade failures when early tasks escalate. Default: no limit (all ready tasks can be dispatched).

branchStrategy.description:
Branch strategy for the workflow.
  - branch-per-task: each task works on its own feature branch and merges to targetBranch on success
  - single-branch: all tasks commit to a shared long-lived branch

targetBranch.description: Branch that successful tasks merge into. Default: main.

tasks.description: Ordered list of tasks with dependency declarations. Order is advisory (suggests natural execution sequence) but dependencies are authoritative for dispatch gating.

TaskManifestEntry.description: A single entry in the task manifest declaring a task and its dependencies.

taskId.description: Unique task identifier. Must match the taskId used in dispatch. Lowercase with hyphens.

spec.description: Path to the task specification file, relative to the project root. The spec contains the Title, Description, Work Items, and Acceptance Criteria for the task.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of what this task accomplishes.

dependsOn.description: Task IDs that must reach DONE before this task can leave ASSIGN. Empty array means no dependencies (can start immediately). Referenced taskIds must exist elsewhere in this manifest.

blockOnFailure.description: When true, if any task in dependsOn reaches ESCALATED or FAILED, this task transitions to BLOCKED automatically. When false, the task remains pending and can be dispatched manually even if a dependency failed.

parallelizable.description: Whether this task can execute in parallel with other tasks that share no dependency relationship. When wipLimit is 1, this is effectively false for all tasks. When true and wipLimit > 1, multiple ready tasks with no shared dependencies may be dispatched simultaneously.
